query: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_bu_hierarchy() RETURNS TABLE(n1 text, n2 text, n3 text, code text, bu text, id text, level text, emp_no numeric) LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER AS $X$ BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT b."Business units N-1"::text, b."Business units N-2"::text, b."Business units N-3"::text, b."CODE"::text, b."BU"::text, b."ID"::text, b."Level"::text, b."Emp. No."::numeric FROM "TMC"."BUs Hierarchy" b; END; $X$; GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION public.get_bu_hierarchy() TO anon, authenticated;
